SMILE INDEX: 34
WINDOW: 541.100s to 577.767s (smile at 561.100s to 562.767s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[518.200-550.560] interviewee: go by streetcar every morning to the hospital, to the pharmacy, and there you will be doing your duty.
[550.560-620.983] interviewee: For last six months, I didn't do any exercises. And I went in the morning dressed up to the pharmacy. They couldn't transfer me permanently there. But I had to go by streetcar. This was up to the end. This was the last six months. So I got away with it. After serving in the army the two years, I went to the university in Krakow

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
there. But
